notes.text: We've now fixed the rendering issue of the interactive bar chart while navigating back to list report from an object page
We've now fixed the rendering issue of the interactive line chart while navigating back to list report from an object page
We've now updated the value truncation digit to 5 for the harvey ball micro chart and the value varies between languages
We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
